<center><h1 style="font-size: 3.8rem; font-weight: 800; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #f5b7a0; text-shadow: 3px 3px 0 rgba(233, 196, 106, 0.5);, 6px 6px 0 rgba(233, 196, 106, 0.3); letter-spacing: 1.5px; line-height: 1.2; position: relative; padding-bottom: 25px;">测测你是哪种汪星人</h1> (link:"开始测试",(css:"display: inline-block; padding: 18px 45px; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e76f51 0%, #f4a261 100%); border: none; border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(231, 111, 81, 0.4); transition: all 0.3s ease; letter-spacing: 1px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;"))[(go-to:"开始测试")] </center><center> <p style="color:#f4a261;font-size:2rem;"> 周末你更倾向于如何安排时间？</p> (link:"约朋友聚餐、逛街、参加社交活动",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #f4a261;color: #f4a261;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #f4a261;border: 2px solid #f4a261;color: white;")))[(set:$a to (a: 2))(go-to:"2")] #f4a261;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #f4a261;border: 2px solid #f4a261;color: white;")))[(set:$a to (a: 1))(go-to:"2")] (link:"独自去户外徒步、拍照、探索新地方",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #f4a261;color: #f4a261;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #f4a261;border: 2px solid #f4a261;color: white;")))[(set:$a to (a: 3))(go-to:"2")] <center> <p style="color:#f4a261;font-size:2rem;"> 面对一项陌生的工作任务，你第一反应是？？</p> (link:"先查资料、做计划，理清步骤再行动",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #f4a261;color:
